name: welcome-matxchange
response_html:
Welcome, {{ doc.first_name }}.

Your account has been created. You are registered as a {{ doc.role_profile_name }}.

Log in →

Matxchange Ltd · matxchange.co.ke
If you did not create this account, ignore this email.
subject: Welcome to MatXchange

name: payment-confirmed
response:
<div style="font-family:ui-monospace,monospace;max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;background:#ffffff;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #E5E7EB">

 <div style="background:#1A1A1A;padding:1.5rem;text-align:center">

   <img src="https://matxchange.co.ke/files/logo.png" height="40" alt="MatXchange" style="display:block;margin:0 auto">

 </div>

 <div style="padding:2rem">

   <h2 style="color:#111827;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:0">Payment confirmed.</h2>

   <table style="width:100%;font-size:0.85rem;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:1rem">

     <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6">

       <td style="color:#6B7280;padding:0.5rem 0">Transaction</td>

       <td style="color:#111827;text-align:right;font-weight:600;padding:0.5rem 0">{{ doc.name }}</td>

     </tr>

     <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6">

       <td style="color:#6B7280;padding:0.5rem 0">Material</td>

       <td style="color:#111827;text-align:right;padding:0.5rem 0">{{ doc.waste_category }}</td>

     </tr>

     <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6">

       <td style="color:#6B7280;padding:0.5rem 0">Weight</td>

       <td style="color:#111827;text-align:right;padding:0.5rem 0">{{ doc.quantity_kg }} kg</td>

     </tr>

     <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6">

       <td style="color:#6B7280;padding:0.5rem 0">Amount</td>

       <td style="color:#111827;text-align:right;font-weight:700;padding:0.5rem 0">KES {{ doc.total_amount_kes }}</td>

     </tr>

     <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6">

       <td style="color:#6B7280;padding:0.5rem 0">M-Pesa Ref</td>

       <td style="color:#111827;text-align:right;padding:0.5rem 0">{{ doc.payment_reference }}</td>

     </tr>

     <tr>

       <td style="color:#6B7280;padding:0.5rem 0">Blockchain</td>

       <td style="color:#111827;text-align:right;font-size:0.75rem;padding:0.5rem 0">{{ doc.stellar_hash[:20] }}...</td>

     </tr>

   </table>

   <hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid #F3F4F6;margin:1.5rem 0">

   <p style="color:#9CA3AF;font-size:0.75rem;margin:0">Matxchange Ltd · matxchange.co.ke<br>Automated payment confirmation.</p>

 </div>

</div>
response_html:
Payment confirmed.

Transaction {{ doc.name }}
Material {{ doc.waste_category }}
Weight {{ doc.quantity_kg }} kg
Amount KES {{ doc.total_amount_kes }}
M-Pesa Ref {{ doc.payment_reference }}
Blockchain {{ doc.stellar_hash[:20] }}...

Matxchange Ltd · matxchange.co.ke
Automated payment confirmation.
subject: Payment Confirmed — {{ doc.name }}
